mapper.select: SELECT schedule_id, staff_id, work_date, start_time, end_time, available_status, create_time, update_time FROM schedule WHERE schedule_id = #{scheduleId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO schedule (staff_id, work_date, start_time, end_time, available_status) VALUES (#{staffId}, #{workDate}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{availableStatus})
